focus: Add a visual flow diagram to Search Explain and expose the same retrieval flow through the explain API.
reason_started: The operator asked for Search Explain to use a flow diagram to explain the query-to-results flow.
reason_ended: The flow diagram is deployed, retrievalFlow is in the explain API, local validation passed, and public checks passed twice.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: 16 tests passed, including flow diagram and retrievalFlow assertions.

validators_executed.name: public root flow UI checks
validators_executed.evidence: Root URL served the Search Explain flow diagram.

validators_executed.name: public explain retrievalFlow checks
validators_executed.evidence: Explain endpoints returned retrievalFlow and live Cranfield top results.

validators_skipped.name: browser visual screenshot
validators_skipped.reason: The browser plugin reported no available browser instances earlier in the session.

github_submission.blocker: Flow diagram and evidence changes remain in the working tree for review; no explicit commit or push request was made.

reusable_lessons: Search explain should expose a structured flow in the API when the UI renders a flow diagram, so browser and API users receive consistent explanation semantics.
downstream_impacts: Future BEIR and ESCI explain endpoints should preserve or extend retrievalFlow rather than inventing separate visual-only explanations.
content_seeds: Phase 1 article can use the flow diagram as the visual explanation of the baseline architecture.
evidence_quality_notes: Public HTTP evidence confirms the flow diagram and API retrievalFlow.
Visual screenshot evidence remains unavailable because no browser instance was available through the browser plugin.

supports_mission: Improves transparency of the public explain endpoint.
Keeps the baseline educational without adding unearned search architecture.
Makes the OpenSearch retrieval path easier for users to inspect.
missing: Browser screenshot validation when browser tooling is available.
Phase 1 article linked to commit and endpoint.
goal_drift_review.mission_alignment: GEN-006 improves explainability for Phase 1 while preserving the simple OpenSearch BM25 baseline.
